mapper.select:
SELECT * from (
SELECT * from ( WITH duplicate_codes AS (
SELECT hs_code, '商业' AS data_type FROM base_org_company WHERE status = 1 AND hs_code <> '' GROUP BY hs_code HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
UNION
SELECT hs_code, '药店' AS data_type FROM base_org_drug_store WHERE status = 1 AND hs_code <> '' GROUP BY hs_code HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
UNION
SELECT hs_code, '医院' AS data_type FROM base_org_hos_clean WHERE status = 1 AND hs_code <> '' GROUP BY hs_code HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 )
SELECT data_id, data_code , original_name , keyid, province , name , name_history , address , hs_code , addtime , sign_status , NULL AS yl_remark, '商业' AS org_type, '豪森同一个编码对应多个数据' AS remark FROM base_org_company c WHERE status = 1 AND hs_code <> '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM duplicate_codes dc WHERE dc.hs_code = c.hs_code AND dc.data_type = '商业' )
UNION ALL
SELECT data_id, data_code , original_name , keyid, province , name , history_name , address , hs_code , addtime , sign_status , NULL yl_remark, '药店' org_type, '豪森同一个编码对应多个数据' remark FROM base_org_drug_store ds WHERE status = 1 AND hs_code <> '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM duplicate_codes dc WHERE dc.hs_code = ds.hs_code AND dc.data_type = '药店' )
UNION ALL
SELECT data_id, data_code , original_name , keyid, province , name , name_history , address , hs_code , addtime , NULL AS sign_status, NULL AS yl_remark, '医院' AS org_type, '豪森同一个编码对应多个数据' remark FROM base_org_hos_clean hc WHERE status = 1 AND hs_code <> '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM duplicate_codes dc WHERE dc.hs_code = hc.hs_code AND dc.data_type = '医院' ) ) a
UNION all
SELECT * from ( WITH duplicate_keys AS (
SELECT keyid, '商业' AS data_type FROM base_org_company WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY keyid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT keyid, '药店' AS data_type FROM base_org_drug_store WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY keyid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT keyid, '医院' AS data_type FROM base_org_hos_clean WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY keyid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 )
SELECT data_id, data_code , original_name , keyid, province , name , name_history , address , hs_code , addtime , sign_status , NULL yl_remark, '商业' org_type, '同一条数据对应多个豪森编码，或者没有返回需要确认编码' remark FROM base_org_company c WHERE status = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM duplicate_keys dk WHERE dk.keyid = c.keyid AND dk.data_type = '商业' )
UNION ALL
SELECT data_id, data_code , original_name , keyid, province , name , history_name , address , hs_code , addtime , sign_status , NULL yl_remark, '药店' AS org_type, '同一条数据对应多个豪森编码，或者没有返回需要确认编码' remark FROM base_org_drug_store ds WHERE status = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM duplicate_keys dk WHERE dk.keyid = ds.keyid AND dk.data_type = '药店' )
UNION ALL
SELECT data_id, data_code , original_name , keyid, province , name , name_history , address , hs_code , addtime , NULL sign_status, NULL yl_remark, '医院' org_type, '同一条数据对应多个豪森编码，或者没有返回需要确认编码' remark FROM base_org_hos_clean hc WHERE status = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM duplicate_keys dk WHERE dk.keyid = hc.keyid AND dk.data_type = '医院' ) ) a
) a
AND org_type = #{condition.orgType}
AND data_id = #{condition.dataId}
AND original_name = #{condition.originalName}
AND data_code = #{condition.dataCode}
AND province = #{condition.province}
AND name = #{condition.name}
AND hs_code = #{condition.hsCode}
AND keyid = #{condition.keyid}
